case_title: LOUIS LEE VS. JAMES MAR ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, LOUIS AS TRUSTEE OF THE LOUIS LEE 2005 LIVING TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAR, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 33 GRAND VIEW TERRACE (LOWER IN-LAW UNIT) SAN FRANCISCO CA 94114 $2,242.50 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,242.50, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FO RENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LOUIS AS TRUSTEE OF THE LOUIS LEE 2005 LIVING TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT MAR, JAMES DOES I TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF OLIVIA DOPLER, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LOUIS AS TRUSTEE OF THE LOUIS LEE 2005 LIVING TRUST
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FORN ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LOUIS AS TRUSTEE OF THE LOUIS LEE 2005 LIVING TRUST
DECLARATION OF LOUIS LEE IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LOUIS AS TRUSTEE OF THE LOUIS LEE 2005 LIVING TRUST
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LOUIS AS TRUSTEE OF THE LOUIS LEE 2005 LIVING TRUST ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT MAR, JAMES
